SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.observable.micrometer

Class ThresholdSnapshotPublisher

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.observable.micrometer.AbstractSnapshotPublisher
com.societegenerale.failover.observable.micrometer.ThresholdSnapshotPublisher
All Implemented Interfaces:
SnapshotPublisher
Direct Known Subclasses:
ClusterSnapshotPublisher
public abstract class ThresholdSnapshotPublisher extends AbstractSnapshotPublisher
Time-threshold extension of AbstractSnapshotPublisher: implements shouldPublish() to allow at most one push per intervalSeconds. A CAS on lastPushTime ensures only one caller wins when multiple metric events arrive in the same window.

No push occurs when the app is idle (no metric events) — frequency is bounded by activity, not by a polling clock. The Executor is injected by autoconfiguration (virtual-thread executor).

Subclasses provide the actual push implementation via SnapshotPublisher.push().

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Method Details

    • shouldPublish

      protected boolean shouldPublish()
      Description copied from class: AbstractSnapshotPublisher
      Decides whether a snapshot push should be dispatched on this event. Must be fast and non-blocking — called on the metric event thread.
      Specified by:
      shouldPublish in class AbstractSnapshotPublisher
      Returns:
      true to dispatch a push, false to skip
